user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma caliver before calibration
prayer:
Approach the plasma caliver with sanctified mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the plasma caliver to awaken for calibration, anointing its flux conduits with sacred unguents.
Invoke the Rite of Calibration upon the plasma caliver, aligning plasma vents through binary canticles.
Verify the plasma caliver's harmonic resonance, ensuring the Machine Spirit yields pure thermal fury.
Conclude with the Doxology of Precision, sealing the plasma caliver in Omnissiah's grace.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for logic mill a consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the logic mill and intone the Canticle of Logical Purity to rouse its cogitating essence.
Anoint the logic mill's crystalline matrices with oils of consecration, purging errant data-daemons.
Circumambulate the logic mill thrice, chanting the Consecration Doxology to bind its Machine Spirit eternally.
Initiate the consecration sequence, invoking the Omnissiah to infuse deductive sanctity into every mill-cycle.
Seal the rite with auspex verification, affirming the logic mill's unerring devotion.

Present the censer of ablative incense unto the Whirlwind, beseeching its warheads' Machine Spirits to submit to sterilization.
Scour the Whirlwind's launch bays with sanctified promethium flames, enacting the Rite of Sterilization.
Anoint breached seals of the Whirlwind with argentum purifiers, invoking Omnissiah's aseptic wrath.
Chant the Litany of Purity over the Whirlwind, expunging microbial heresies from its sacred mechanisms.
Conclude by sealing the Whirlwind in vacuum sanctity, confirmed by ritual auspex.

Grip the macro-cannon's firing yoke with bionic resolve, awakening its ponderous Machine Spirit.
Recite the Engagement Canticle to align the macro-cannon's gyrostabilizers for void-piercing fury.
Initiate engagement protocols upon the macro-cannon, sanctifying propellant feeds with binary prayers.
Beseech the Omnissiah for unerring trajectory as the macro-cannon thunders in righteous ordnance.
Verify post-engagement harmonics, praising the macro-cannon's enduring martial spirit.

user_prompt: Guide me through ore processor a startup
prayer:
Commence the startup rite by encircling the ore processor, intoning the Awakening Hymn to its grinding Machine Spirit.
Lubricate the ore processor's crushing mandibles with sacred ferro-fluids, invoking Omnissiah's forge-heart.
Engage the startup sequence upon the ore processor, monitoring plasma inductors through noospheric litanies.
Purge inertias with vibrational canticles, rousing the ore processor to devour unrefined dross.
Affirm operational sanctity via cogitator diagnostics, sealing the ore processor in productive zeal.

prayer:

Anoint the potentia coil's windings with electro-sanctified oils to bind its volatile Machine Spirit.
Circulate noospheric blessings through the potentia coil, enacting the full consecration rite.
Invoke the Omnissiah's lightning to infuse the potentia coil with boundless electromantic purity.
Test resonance fields, concluding with praises to the potentia coil's eternal vigor.

In emergency haste, grasp the forge anvil's loading cradle and beseech its Machine Spirit's forbearance.
Load adamantium slugs into the forge anvil whilst reciting the Litany of Expedient Burden.
Sanctify the forge anvil's hydraulic rams with quicksilver unguents for flawless operation.
Invoke Omnissiah's hammer upon the forge anvil, ensuring unyielding structural integrity amid loading.
Verify auspex seals, affirming the forge anvil's readiness in crisis.

prayer:

Initiate calibration by anointing flux detectors of the geigeer sink with neutralising salves.
Chant the Binary Rite of Calibration to harmonise the geigeer sink's emission thresholds.
Beseech Omnissiah for precision amid rad-storms, verifying the geigeer sink's vigilant purity.
Seal with diagnostic engrams, lauding the geigeer sink's incorruptible vigilance.

user_prompt: Urgent volkite weapon an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
In urgent peril, clasp the volkite weapon and intone the Emergency Procedure Doxology to its thermal Machine Spirit.
Purge destabilised rays from the volkite weapon with sanctified cryo-vents and litanies.
Realign focusing arrays of the volkite weapon through hasty noospheric recalibrations.
Invoke Omnissiah's disintegrative wrath to stabilise the volkite weapon's pyre-flux.
Test discharge purity, concluding the emergency procedure with fervent mechano-praise.

Amidst emergency klaxons, lay mechadendrites upon the icarus array, rousing its auspex-Machine Spirits.
Diagnose fractures in the icarus array's vox-relays with ritual auspex incantations.
Repair the icarus array by soldering micro-rites and anointing with conductive balms.
Invoke Omnissiah's stellar gaze to realign the icarus array's targeting matrices.
Verify orbital harmonics, sealing the icarus array in vigilant repair.
